notes: Synthetic control used to test genericity on a domain the agent has never seen, with planted defects: CHG-2111 was CAB-approved by email but never recorded in the change log (population completeness -> attribute 1 fails); CHG-2107 has no retrospective approval and CHG-2104's approval took 9 business days (attribute 2 fails; CHG-2102 at exactly 5 business days is the boundary case that must NOT be flagged); CHG-2109 explicitly lacks post-implementation test evidence and the claimed attachments for the rest are not provided (attribute 3).
